WORK INSTRUCTION – RECONFIG – ASSIGN PICK TASKS

## **ASSIGN PICK TASKS**

As part of the 'Component Pick Release' process for WIP Jobs, new Pick Tasks will be created. These tasks do not automatically have a priority setting assigned.

All 'Manufacturing' Pick Tasks are completed by the Warehouse Team daily after assigning the Pick Tasks to the pickers. However, if needed, the Planner can request for a specific job to be picked as a priority.

**Step 1:** Using Oracle Forms, navigate to 'WMS Inquiries' -> 'WMS Control Board'

**Step 2:** Search for all the 'Manufacturing' Tasks (Source)

Tick the boxes for the Status codes you want to include:

- Unreleased: Task is not available for pickers
- Pending: Task is available for all pickers
- Queued: Task is assigned to a specific user
- Dispatched: Task is grouped with an active task
- Active: Task is active on a scangun
- Loaded: Task is loaded but not dropped
- Completed: Task is completed

Click on the 'Find' button

Enter any other selection criteria, e.g. Priority

**Step 3:** All Tasks meeting the selection criteria will be displayed

**Step 4:** Select the Tasks you want to update *Note: You can select multiple records at once*

> Click on the 'Manage' button (bottom right) or right-click on a Task and select 'Manage Tasks'

![](_page_0_Figure_20.jpeg)

![](_page_0_Picture_21.jpeg)
Metadata: "Sub heading": "ASSIGN PICK TASKS: ........As part of the 'Component Pick Release' process for WIP Jobs, new Pick Tasks will be created. These tasks do not automatically have a priority setting assigned. All 'Manufacturing' Pick Tasks are comp............"

chunk_id4.Sub Heading 2: To process the changes click on the 'Execute Now' button .....
chunk_id4.Sub Heading 3: To save the changes, click on the 'Save' icon in the toolbar .....

Text:
**Step 5:** The 'Manage Tasks' screen will be displayed showing the number of Tasks currently selected at the top

> To update the status – select the new status from the lookup, for example 'Pending' or 'Queued'

## *Please note:*

*When setting a Task to 'Queued' you must assign it to a specific 'Employee' Type the first few letters of the Employee's last name and hit 'Tab' to open the list of suggestions* 

*Always tick the box for 'Override Employee Eligibility Check'*

To update the priority – enter the new priority. The Tasks are despatched to the Pickers starting with the highest priority number first

To process the changes click on the 'Execute Now' button

To save the changes, click on the 'Save' icon in the toolbar

![](_page_0_Figure_31.jpeg)

![](_page_0_Picture_32.jpeg)
